title: Cobblemon Dreams
description: A modpack made for the server Cobblemon Dreams that focuses on quality and aesthetics. This modpack can be used for almost any Cobblemon server!
body:
## ***An official modpack of Cobblemon Dreams - Fabric 1.21.1!***


> Discord: [Cobblemon Dreams](https://discord.gg/Q3tRnJRNqm)
> 
> Server IP: *play.cobblemondreams.com*


### A Fabric modpack made for the server Cobblemon Dreams that focuses on quality and aesthetics. This modpack can be used for any Cobblemon server that does **_not_** require any specific mods so that you can enjoy it on any server or in singleplayer! 

Are you interested in our server? Here are some of the amazing features we currently have and that are in development!

- ✨ Pokemon Focused Gameplay
- 🌍﻿ Overhauled World Generation
- 💸﻿ Player-driven Economy
- 👵 Pokébingo
- 🌐 GTS
- 🔢 Catch Combos
- 🐀 Custom Pokémon Cosmetics
- 🎭 Custom Regional Forms
- 📑 Unique Trivia
- 🥋 Move tutors and tms
- 🥚 Daycare
- 📣 ﻿Official and Custom Mega Evolutions


Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Q3tRnJRNqm) and let us know!
